title: stachys glandulosa
intro: Stachys glandulosa, also known as sticky hedge nettle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stachys glandulosa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Stachys glandulosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
